question: What was the registration number of the helicopter involved in this accident?
reference_answer: N323TT

question: On what date did the accident occur?
What was the make and model of the helicopter?
reference_answer: Robinson Helicopter Company R44 II
supporting_source_spans: Aircraft field in header, Aircraft Make field

question: What was the exact time of the accident (local time)?
reference_answer: 1620 Pacific daylight time (16:20 Local)

question: In what state did this accident occur?
reference_answer: Washington

question: What time did the helicopter depart Seattle (BFI)?
reference_answer: 1328 (1:28 PM Pacific daylight time)

question: How long was the helicopter on the ground at Ellensburg (ELN)?
reference_answer: Approximately 34 minutes (arrived 1437, departed 1511)

question: What time did the helicopter depart Ellensburg?
reference_answer: 1511 (3:11 PM Pacific daylight time)

question: Approximately how many minutes elapsed between departure from Seattle and the accident?
reference_answer: Approximately 172 minutes (2 hours 52 minutes from 1328 to 1620)

question: At what time did the observation facility (KSKA) record meteorological conditions?
supporting_source_spans: Meteorological Information table, Observation Time field

question: Who was in command of the helicopter at the time of departure from Seattle?
reference_answer: The pilot (certificated, returning the helicopter to Coeur d'Alene)

question: How many occupants were on board the helicopter?
reference_answer: Two occupants: the pilot and one pilot-rated passenger (friend)

question: What type of terrain did the helicopter impact?
reference_answer: Open, hilly terrain

question: In what condition was the fuselage after the accident?
reference_answer: The fuselage was mostly consumed by postaccident fire but came to rest upright at the first point of impact

question: Under what Federal Aviation Regulations was this flight conducted?
reference_answer: Title 14 Code of Federal Regulations Part 91: General aviation - Personal
supporting_source_spans: Flight Conducted Under field in header and narrative

question: What type of flight plan was filed for this flight?
reference_answer: NONE - No flight plan was filed
supporting_source_spans: Meteorological Information table, Type of Flight Plan Filed field

question: How many gallons of fuel did the pilot purchase at Ellensburg?
reference_answer: 14 gallons

question: How far was the tail rotor assembly found from the main fuselage?
reference_answer: Approximately 340 feet

question: What was the probable cause of this accident at the time this report was issued?
reference_answer: No probable cause was determined; this is a preliminary report

question: Why did the helicopter impact the terrain according to the preliminary investigation?
reference_answer: The cause of impact is not stated in the preliminary report; investigation is ongoing

question: As of the date this preliminary report was issued, what investigation status or conclusion was definitively stated?
reference_answer: As of the preliminary report date, the only definitive conclusions were factual (aircraft type, location, injuries, ADS-B data); no causal conclusions were stated
supporting_source_spans: Report status: 'This information is preliminary and subject to change'

question: What does the report indicate about the completeness of the investigation as of the report date?
reference_answer: The report is preliminary; conclusions and probable cause are not yet determined and will not be presented

question: What additional examinations were planned for the wreckage?
reference_answer: The wreckage was transported to a secure facility for further examination

question: How complete was the meteorological data coverage for the accident location?
reference_answer: The meteorological data was collected from a facility 21 nautical miles from the accident site (KSKA at 2461 ft elevation), not directly at the accident location

question: What limitation is noted regarding the availability of final conclusions in this report?
reference_answer: No probable cause determination or final safety recommendations are available in this preliminary report; these will be issued in the final report
